statement: In every magma, Equation 2781 (`x = ((y * z) * (x * z)) * w`) implies Equation 2758 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0169
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op x z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z y)) y)
